news.headline: Aimfinity Investment Corp. extends deadline for business combination to July 28, 2024 by depositing $60,000.
news.summary: Today in Wilmington, Delaware, Aimfinity Investment Corp I (NASDAQ: AIMAU) disclosed plans to extend the deadline for its initial business combination from June 28, 2024, to July 28, 2024. This special purpose acquisition company, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, attributed this extension to I-Fa Chang, the sponsor's manager. Chang facilitated the extension by depositing $60,000 into the Trust Account, earmarked as the "Monthly Extension Payment."

news.headline: Augusta Gold extends loan to September 30, 2024 with Augusta Investments Inc. TSX: G, OTCQB: AUGG, FSE:11B.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on June 28, 2024, Augusta Gold Corp. (TSX: G) (OTCQB: AUGG) (FSE:11B) shared that they have prolonged the maturity deadline of their loan with Augusta Investments Inc. The extension moves the loan due date to September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Fund (UTF) discloses sources of distribution to shareholders on June 28, 2024.

This announcement details the sources of the upcoming distribution and the cumulative distributions paid throughout the fiscal year. It aims to provide relevant information to the fund's shareholders.

It is anticipated to exhibit a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 30.91% throughout the forecasted period. This growth is attributed to the rising demand for language learning games, driven by the increased interest in language acquisition.

Shareholders will be provided with information on the cumulative distributions paid during the fiscal year. This update was made through a press release.

news.headline: Presidential debate and Apple's China business discussed, for more details visit Bloomberg's website.
Sandfire Resources America changes bridge loan agreement with largest shareholder, shares third variation agreement.
news.summary: In Montana, on June 28, 2024, Sandfire Resources America Inc. disclosed a new development. The company has engaged in a third variation agreement to its bridge loan agreement with Sandfire BC Holdings (Australia) Pty Ltd. and Tintina Montana Inc. Sandfire America, the company in question, made this move in collaboration with its largest shareholder, Sandfire BC, and its wholly-owned subsidiary, Tintina Montana. This agreement marks a significant step in the financial strategy of the company and underlines its commitment to its operations.

news.headline: Xcel Energy to review Q2 2024 financial results on August 1, 2024, 9:00am Central Time. Dial 1-866-58 to participate.
news.summary: Xcel Energy (NASDAQ: XEL) is set to hold a conference call to discuss their second quarter financial results on Thursday, August 1, 2024. The earnings report will be made public before the market opens on the same day. The call is scheduled to commence at 9:00 a.m. Central Time. To join the conference call, participants are advised to dial in at least 10 minutes early and adhere to the instructions provided by the operator. A conference password will be required for access. For those in the US, the dial-in number is 1-866-58.

news.headline: Mississippi homeowner receives $8K grant for new air conditioning system from FHLB Dallas and Planters Bank.
news.summary: In Doddsville, Mississippi, Stella Groves faced a difficult summer without a functioning air conditioning system. Fortunately, she received over $8,000 in assistance through the Special Needs Assistance Program (SNAP) from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) via Planters Bank. SNAP grants, distributed by FHLB Dallas through member institutions, aim to support individuals in need. Groves' grant allowed her to install a new air conditioning unit, bringing relief during the hot Mississippi summer.

news.headline: Cohen & Steers Closed-End Opportunity Fund (FOF) discloses distribution sources to shareholders on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, shareholders of Cohen & Steers Closed-End Opportunity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: FOF) will receive a distribution. The fund will provide details about the sources of this distribution along with cumulative distributions paid throughout the fiscal year.

news.headline: Researcher at City College charged with fraud. Wang published studies backing simufilam, now in advanced trials.
news.summary: A study conducted by City College professor, Hoau-Yan Wang, has shown promising results in support of simufilam, a drug currently in advanced clinical trials. The research findings have indicated positive effects of simufilam, with significant implications in the treatment of certain conditions. Wang's studies have provided valuable insights into the potential benefits of this medication, offering hope for improved medical interventions.

news.headline: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp. announces outcomes of annual meeting; significant updates disclosed.
Pampers partners with Kevin Hart's Hartbeat for "That's So Baby" featuring Tisha Campbell and Tristan Mack Wilds. Diaper Stash fund aids parents with needed diapers and wipes.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Pampers has launched a unique initiative called Diaper Stash to address the uncertainty parents face regarding the quantity of diapers and wipes needed for their new baby. This program allows friends and family to donate to a fund set up for parents to stock up on these essentials. Pampers aims to raise awareness about the importance of having an ample supply of diapers by introducing "That's So Baby," a 4-part content series inspired by 90s sitcoms. By participating in Diaper Stash, loved ones can support parents in ensuring they have an adequate supply of diapers and wipes for their baby.

news.headline: Yard Force Cable Plug Grass Cleaner now available at Costco Japan - helps maintain pristine lawns effortlessly.
news.summary: Yard Force, a well-known brand in outdoor power equipment, has introduced the Yard Force Cable Plug Grass Cleaner at Costco Japan. This new product aims to provide Japanese homeowners with a convenient solution for lawn maintenance. The Grass Cleaner is designed for efficiency and power, promising to revolutionize the way people care for their lawns. It offers exceptional performance to make tasks easier and more effective. The product is now available for purchase at Costco Japan, offering customers a user-friendly tool to keep their lawns pristine.

news.headline: Apollo Silver Corp. reports AGM results: all 4 directors elected, auditors re-appointed, shareholders approve employee Share Option Plan.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 28, 2024, Apollo Silver Corp. disclosed that at its Annual General Meeting, shareholders voted in favor of several key proposals. The shareholders, by a majority, elected all four directors up for election. They also approved the re-appointment of Davidson & Company LLP as auditors of the Company. Additionally, shareholders backed the Company’s employee Share Option Plan. Apollo Silver Corp. is listed as (TSX.V:APGO, OTCQB:APGOF, Frankfurt:6ZF0).

news.headline: 3M students in SAVE plan have loan payments paused by Education Dept due to court rulings, while payments recalculated.
news.summary: The Education Department announced that it will grant forbearance to borrowers while recalculating their payments to adhere to recent court decisions.

This surge in market growth is attributed to the escalating healthcare costs and an increased emphasis on health and wellness globally.

news.headline: Highest value of shares traded on Nasdaq closing cross during 2024 Russell US Indexes reconstitution sets new record.
news.summary: At least 15 people were injured in a car crash on the highway yesterday afternoon. The accident involved three vehicles and occurred near Exit 23. Emergency services arrived at the scene within 10 minutes of receiving the call for help. The injured individuals were taken to two nearby hospitals for treatment, where four of them are reported to be in critical condition. Authorities have launched an investigation to determine the cause of the crash. This incident serves as a reminder for drivers to exercise caution on the roads and adhere to traffic regulations to prevent such accidents.

news.headline: NASA awards University of Hawaii contract to operate Infrared Telescope Facility on Mauna Kea.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, it was announced that NASA has chosen the University of Hawaii located in Honolulu to oversee and manage their Infrared Telescope Facility (IRTF) situated on Mauna Kea in Hilo, Hawaii. This contract for the Management and Operations of NASA's IRTF is a hybrid firm-fixed-price agreement.

The company has also announced an activation on Exosphere. This milestone event takes place in Las Vegas on June 28, 2024. Upper Deck is renowned globally for its sports and entertainment collectibles.

news.headline: Democrats are considering replacing Biden with 270 electoral votes needed. Find out how.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was detailed that the annual budget for the city's infrastructure projects has been increased by 15%, reaching a total of $50 million. This rise in funds aims to support the development of new roads, public transportation systems, and green spaces within the community. Additionally, it was highlighted that there has been a 25% decrease in traffic congestion due to these efforts. The city officials expressed their satisfaction with the progress made so far and emphasized their commitment to further enhance the urban environment for residents. In light of these improvements, the city is expected to attract more investments and foster economic growth in the coming years.

news.headline: New enhanced AI model Gemini unveiled by Google, promising faster performance and increased capabilities.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.2%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. This spike in unemployment has left over 1.5 million people without jobs. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job creation, with only 100,000 new jobs added last month, compared to the average of 200,000 per month over the past year. Economists are voicing concerns about the slowing job market and its potential impact on the overall economy. The government is being urged to take necessary steps to address this growing issue and prevent further job losses.

news.headline: Western Exploration Inc. adds Peak Investor Marketing to investor relations team to boost market awareness. TSX-V: WEX.
news.summary: Western Exploration Inc. (TSX-V: WEX) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has welcomed Peak Investor Marketing Corp. to their investor relations team. Peak Investor will provide market-making and investor relations services in compliance with TSX Venture Exchange policies. The collaboration aims to enhance market visibility for Western Exploration, ultimately benefiting the Company and its stakeholders.

Research conducted by Technavio indicates a predicted compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 16.1% throughout the forecast period. The growth is attributed to the continual advancements in proteomics field, indicating significant development in the market in the coming years.

news.headline: Lowell Farms Inc. in Salinas, California, announces resignation of CFO Jamie Schniedwind, CEO Mark Ainsworth to serve as Interim CFO from June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Lowell Farms Inc., a California cannabis company listed on the CSE as LOWL and OTCQX as LOWLF, disclosed the departure of Mr. Jamie Schniedwind, Chief Financial Officer. As a company with extensive distribution and production capabilities encompassing extraction, manufacturing, sales, and brand management, Lowell Farms Inc. appointed Mr. Mark Ainsworth, Chief Executive Officer, as the Interim CFO. Ainsworth will hold this position until a new CFO is officially named.

news.headline: Logan Paul files lawsuit against Coffeezilla for defamation over allegations related to CryptoZoo game. #Influencers #LegalDrama
news.summary: Popular social media personality Logan Paul has accused Coffeezilla of hiding essential information that clears Paul's name regarding his connection to the failed cryptocurrency game. Paul asserts that Coffeezilla intentionally kept this exculpatory evidence from reaching the public.

news.headline: Northland Power sells 100% stake in La Lucha solar facility to Cometa Energía for an undisclosed amount.
news.summary: Today, Northland Power Inc. (TSX: NPI) finalized the sale of its complete ownership of the La Lucha solar facility to Cometa Energía, S.A. de C.V., a subsidiary of Saavi Energía (Saavi). This transaction, initially disclosed on March 4, 2024, marks the transfer of a 100% interest in the facility to Cometa Energía.

As of June 28, 2024, Pi Network, a Web3 app ecosystem and developer platform, boasts a community of millions of individuals actively involved in mining.
